name: Services Section
description: A services showcase section with service cards featuring icons, titles, descriptions, and optional pricing or CTA links. Supports list and grid layouts.
whenToUse: Use to display business services, menu categories, or product offerings in a structured layout.

props.name: services
props.description: Array of service objects with icon, title, description, and optional price

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns in grid layout

props.name: showPrice
props.description: Whether to display pricing on service cards
